docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHLAFKE,VALERIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOODWIN, DEBORAH SHARON $229.34 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $244.34, $35.00 DOLLARS ALLOWED FOR DAMAGES THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT ADMIT TO.
